raw_consumer_statement:
I am requesting to reopen my dispute for the Platinum Dinner Experience at XXXX XXXX, for which I prepaid in full. 

When I arrived for my reservation, the restaurant informed me that the XXXX XXXX was full, and they seated me in the XXXX XXXX instead, providing only the Silver menu, which is a lower-tier experience than what I purchased. I was told to wait for a XXXX XXXX table to open, but after waiting XXXX minutes, no accommodation was made. 

Since I did not receive the service or experience I paid for, I left and immediately raised my concern with the restaurant. They later offered a bottle service as compensation, which I declined because it was not equivalent to the XXXX experience. I made several attempts to resolve this directly with the business, but they refused to refund or rectify the issue. 

I am therefore requesting that American Express reopen this dispute, as the merchant failed to deliver the agreed-upon service. I have documentation showing my prepaid reservation for the Platinum Dinner Experience and can provide correspondence confirming I was only offered the lower Silver-level service. 

I respectfully request a full refund for the service that was not rendered as promised.
